house.title: Finding Greg's House
house.subtitle: Step-by-step walking guide
house.tldr: 15-minute walk from Amalfi. Follow the coastal road through the tunnel to Atrani, then navigate through the charming streets up to the house.

awesome.title: Finding the Meeting Point
awesome.subtitle: Step-by-step walking guide
awesome.tldr: Walk from Amalfi through the coastal tunnel to Atrani. The meeting point is just past the tunnel exit at the Atrani center.
awesome.from_atrani_desc: The meeting point is right at the tunnel exit in Atrani. If you're already in Atrani, it's just a short walk.

01.caption: Start at the Amalfi harbor promenade. You'll see the 'imbarco / boarding' sign pointing to the ferry dock. Walk along the seafront with the water on your right.
01.alt: Amalfi harbor promenade with imbarco boarding sign and sea view

02.caption: Continue along the coastal road heading east. Keep the sea on your right side.
02.alt: Coastal road leaving Amalfi with sea view

03.caption: Follow the road as it curves along the coastline. You'll see the mountains rising on your left.
03.alt: Curved coastal road with mountain views

04.caption: Keep walking along the promenade. The road is well-paved and easy to follow.

05.caption: Continue straight ahead. You're on the main road connecting Amalfi to Atrani.
05.alt: Main road between Amalfi and Atrani

06.caption: The road continues along the coast. Watch for the tunnel entrance coming up ahead.
06.alt: Coastal road approaching the tunnel area

07.caption: You'll see the road narrowing as you approach the tunnel section.

08.caption: Keep following the main road. Stay on the sidewalk where available.

09.caption: Continue along the road. The Atrani tunnel entrance is getting closer.

10.caption: Almost at the tunnel. Keep following the road straight ahead.
10.alt: Final stretch before the Atrani tunnel

11.caption: You can see the tunnel entrance area up ahead now.
11.alt: Approaching the grand Atrani tunnel entrance

12.caption: The tunnel entrance is just ahead. Keep going straight.

13.caption: You've reached the famous Atrani tunnel portal — 'Il Portale di Atrani'. Walk through the tunnel to enter Atrani.
13.alt: The grand stone archway of Il Portale di Atrani

01.caption: Exiting the tunnel area, you'll see a restaurant terrace (Zaccaria) on the right and another short tunnel ahead. Keep going straight.
01.alt: Tunnel exit with Zaccaria restaurant terrace and sea view

02.caption: Continue past the restaurant area. Follow the road as it leads into Atrani.
02.alt: Road leading into Atrani past the waterfront restaurants

03.caption: Walk along the Atrani waterfront. You'll see colorful buildings and the piazza ahead.

04.caption: Continue through the Atrani waterfront area. Keep following the main path.
04.alt: Atrani seaside area with buildings and sea

05.caption: You're in the heart of Atrani now. Follow the path through the village.

06.caption: Continue along the street. Look for the narrow passages leading uphill.

07.caption: Enter the narrow streets of the old village. The path leads through arched passages.
07.alt: Narrow Atrani street with arched passages

08.caption: Follow the path through the covered passage. Stay on the main walkway.

09.caption: Continue through the village streets. The path winds between traditional buildings.
09.alt: Winding village street between old buildings

10.caption: Keep following the narrow path. You'll see stairs coming up.
10.alt: Narrow village path with stairs ahead

11.caption: Take the stairs upward. Hold onto the railing if available.
11.alt: Stone stairs in the Atrani village

12.caption: Continue climbing the stairs through the village.
12.alt: Stairs leading upward through old buildings

13.caption: Almost there! Keep following the path upward.
13.alt: Upper village path near the destination

14.caption: You're very close now. Continue along the path.

15.caption: Follow the narrow street. Look for the courtyard entrance ahead.
15.alt: Narrow street leading to the house area

16.caption: Continue along the path. The house is in this area.
16.alt: Street in the upper village near the house

17.caption: You're in the right neighborhood. Keep going just a bit further.

18.caption: Almost at the door! Follow the path to the courtyard.

19.caption: You can see the courtyard entrance. Head straight to it.

20.caption: This is Greg's House! Welcome. Look for the green door and the courtyard with plants.
20.alt: Greg's House courtyard with green door and plants

01.caption: Start at the Atrani bus stop in the main square. You'll see the bus shelter with the mountains behind.
01.alt: Atrani bus stop and main piazza with mountain backdrop

02.caption: From the bus stop, head toward the village center. Follow the road downhill.
02.alt: Road from bus stop heading toward Atrani center

03.caption: Continue along the road. You'll see the village buildings ahead.

04.caption: Keep walking along the main road. Look for the turn-off into the village.
04.alt: Main road through Atrani near the village entrance

05.caption: Follow the road as it leads into the village streets.
05.alt: Road leading into the narrow Atrani streets

06.caption: Enter the village streets. The path becomes narrower here.
06.alt: Narrow village entrance from the bus stop direction

07.caption: Continue into the narrow streets. You'll join the main path to the house from here.
07.alt: Narrow street connecting to the main route through Atrani

01.caption: At the tunnel exit, you'll see the road leading into Atrani with directional signs ahead.
01.alt: Atrani tunnel exit with road signs and town view

02.caption: This is the meeting point! You've arrived. Look for Greg nearby.
02.alt: The meeting point at the Atrani center
